Task.Title: So Nhap Giang Ho 1/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Chao mung bang huu den voi the gioi Vo Kiem.
Task.DoingTalk: Bai Kien<color=#FFCC00> Long Ngu </color>O Tan Thu Thon
Task.CompleteTalk: Giang ho day song, binh bien khap noi, rat can bang huu ra tay dong gop mot phan suc luc!

Task.Title: So Nhap Giang Ho 2/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang huu hay noi chuyen voi cac vi bo lao trong thon se biet ro tinh hinh hon.
Task.DoingTalk: Den Bai Kien<color=#FFCC00> Chu Tieu Diem </color>O Tan Thu Thon
Task.CompleteTalk: Gan day chien loan khap noi, mot thon lang nhu o day cung khong the tranh khoi nao loan.

Task.Title: So Nhap Giang Ho 3/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang huu hay tim gap lao<color=#FFCC00> Xa Phu </color>,ong ta la nguoi dan duong dang tin cay va tot bung.
Task.DoingTalk: Den Bai Kien<color=#FFCC00> Xa Phu </color>O Tan Thu Thon
Task.CompleteTalk: Moi ngay ta deu phai dua khach len thanh thi, tren duong di thuong xuyen thay canh nao loan, that nguy hiem.

Task.Title: So Nhap Giang Ho 4/5
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#FFCC00> Long Ngu </color>la nguoi co trach nhiem, ong ta huong dan nguoi moi lam quen voi thoi buoi binh bien nay.
Task.DoingTalk: Quay lai gap<color=#FFCC00> Long Ngu </color>xem ong ta co gi chi giao!
Task.CompleteTalk: Thieu hiep mat mui thanh tu, than thu phi pham. At la tu Tuong Duong toi day roi ?

Task.Title: So Nhap Giang Ho 5/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Trong the gioi <color=#FFCC66>Vo Kiem </color>, thuc luc quyet dinh tat ca, khong co cho cho ke hen nhat. Hay tim o cho cua<color=#FFCC00> Vo Su </color>de thinh giao va ren luyen ban than.
Task.DoingTalk: Tim<color=#FFCC00> Vo Su </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen </color>de luyen tap.
Task.CompleteTalk: Hom nay that nhieu nguoi tim ta, vo hoc bat dai tinh tham, nhung truoc tien ta can kiem tra nen tang cua bang huu.

Task.Title: Vo Hoc Co Ban 1/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang suc manh von co hay pha huy <color=#FF0000> Coc Go </color>de ta xem the luc cua bang huu.
Task.DoingTalk: Tap danh<color=#FF0000> Coc Go </color>o Ba Lang Huyen
Task.CompleteTalk: Rat tot! The luc cua nguoi cung kha do chu!

Task.Title: Vo Hoc Co Ban 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Tiep tuc pha huy<color=#FF0000> Moc Nhan </color>cho ta xem ky thuat cua bang huu.
Task.DoingTalk: Danh<color=#FF0000> Moc Nhan </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen </color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Rat tot! The luc cua nguoi cung kha do chu!

Task.Title: Vo Hoc Co Ban 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Cuoi cung la pha huy<color=#FF0000> Bao Cat </color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Tap danh<color=#FF0000> Bao Cat </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen </color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Nen tang cua bang huu rat tot, bai kiem tra xong roi, bang huu hay ve di.

Task.Title: Long Ngu Gia Gia
Task.AcceptTalk: Buoc chan tren giang ho day hiem nguy phai biet tu luong suc minh. Nguoi hay tim gap<color=#FFCC00> Long Ngu </color>ong ta se co nhieu dieu chi giao cho nha nguoi.
Task.DoingTalk: Di tim<color=#FFCC00> Long Ngu </color>noi chuyen
Task.CompleteTalk: Nguoi qua thuc co tai, vuot qua duoc khao nghiem cua<color=#FFCC00> Vo Su </color>that khong phai tam thuong!

Task.Title: Tim Duoc Lieu 1/3
Task.AcceptTalk: !!! Bang huu bi thuong roi, hay den tim<color=#FFCC00> Ngo Than Y </color>xem ong ta co cach khong?.
Task.DoingTalk: Den tim<color=#FFCC00> Ngo Than Y</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#FFCC00> Long Ngu </color>bao nguoi den tim ta?

Task.Title: Tim Duoc Lieu 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi bi thuong khong nhe chut nao. Hay kiem cho ta chut<color=#FF0000> Thit Heo </color>ta se giup nguoi chua tri.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet<color=#FF0000> Heo Trang </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen </color>de lay thit heo.

Task.Title: Tim Duoc Lieu 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#FF0000> Huyet Dan </color>la mot loai thuoc quy, phai dung Thit Heo va nhieu loai thao duoc khac, sau do can dung luyen trong duoc dinh bay bay bon chin ngay moi cho ra thanh pham.
Task.DoingTalk: Thu thap<color=#FF0000> Huyet Thao </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Ngoai dieu che<color=#FF0000> Huyet Dan </color>,<color=#FF0000> Huyet Thao </color>con co the dieu che Kim Sang Duoc.

Task.Title: Dan duoc than ky 1/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#FFCC00> Long Ngu </color>dang tim nguoi hay quay ve xem ong ta con gi giao pho khong.
Task.DoingTalk: Quay lai thinh giao<color=#FFCC00> Long Ngu</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Suc khoe cua nguoi the nao roi?

Task.Title: Dan duoc than ky 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang huu hay giup ta mua 5 binh<color=#FFCC00> Kim Sang Duoc </color>o cho<color=#FFCC00> Ngo Than Y </color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Den chu hieu thuoc mua<color=#FFCC00> Kim Sang Duoc</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#FFCC00> Kim Sang Duoc </color>dung loai ta can.

Task.Title: Dan duoc than ky 3/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi hay di tim<color=#FFCC00> Ngo Than Y </color>ong ta se chi cho nguoi cach dung<color=#FFCC00> Kim Sang Duoc </color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Di tim<color=#FFCC00> Ngo Than Y</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#FFCC00> Kim Sang Duoc </color>la thuoc dac hieu chuyen phuc hoi sinh menh, bang huu nen chuan bi that nhieu truoc khi hanh tau!

Task.Title: Dan duoc than ky 4/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Thuoc hoi phuc co nhieu loai, nhung co ban nhat la hoi phuc sinh luc va noi luc, bang huu hay dung thu xem sao.
Task.DoingTalk: Nhan vao Hanh Trang sau do tim den<color=#FFCC00> Kim Sang Duoc </color>va su dung vat pham.
Task.CompleteTalk: Trong qua trinh hanh tau bang huu se thu thap duoc tai san, hay den Hieu Thuoc de mua thuoc du phong trong nguoi.

Task.Title: Gui thuoc cho Thuong Nhan 1/2
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#FFCC00> Than Bi Thuong Nhan </color>dang bi thuong, ong ay la ban lau nam cua ta. Hay giup ta mang mot so duoc lieu nay cho han.
Task.DoingTalk: Den Tuong Duong tim<color=#FFCC00> Thuong Nhan Than Bi</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Khu khu! Cac ha that chu dao, lai vi ta ma vat va kiem loai thuoc quy nay.Ta rat cam kich !

Task.Title: Gui thuoc cho Thuong Nhan 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Da ta vi dai hiep da khong quan duong xa mang duoc lieu den giup ta tri thuong, hay chuyen loi cam on cua ta den ong ban<color=#FFCC00> Ngo Than Y </color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Quay ve<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Ngo Than Y</color>.

Task.Title: Phien phuc o Tan Thu Thon
Task.AcceptTalk: Vo lam gan day co nhieu dieu ki la, quan hung ac ba ngay cang nhieu hon. Nguoi hay di tim<color=#FFCC00> Long Ngu </color>hoi xem co chuyen gi.
Task.DoingTalk: Di tim<color=#FFCC00> Long Ngu</color>. de tim hieu tinh hinh
Task.CompleteTalk: Khu khu! Cac ha tim ta hoi chuyen la dung roi do, tai Tan Thu Thon nay co hai the luc luon tranh dau voi nhau la tong quan va kim quan do

Task.Title: Uy hiep cua dich nhan
Task.AcceptTalk: Dan thu rung nay that rac roi, pha hoai mua mang cua thon dan, giup thon dan tieu diet chung...!
Task.DoingTalk: Diet tru<color=#FF0000> Huou Dom</color>. o<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Hao cong phu! bang huu con tre da co than thu nhu vay,tuong lai se thanh cao thu.

Task.Title: Bai kien de tu Thieu Lam
Task.AcceptTalk: Cap do cua nguoi da du de gia nhap mon phai, hay tim hieu va chon mot mon phai nguoi muon gia nhap,<color=#FFCC00> Thieu Lam </color>la bac dau trong giang ho voi bay muoi hai tuyet ky vang danh nguoi nen bat dau tu do.
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Tinh Huyen</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Duoc khai sang boi<color=#FFCC00> Dat Ma Su To </color>den tu Tay Truc,<color=#FFCC00> Thieu Lam </color>toa lac tai nui Tung Son Tinh Ha Nam va tu xua da duoc menh danh la Thien Ha De Nhat mon phai tai Trung Nguyen. Ngoi chua nay cung duoc xem la dai dien cho "Vo Lam Chanh phai".

Task.Title: Bai kien de tu Thien Vuong
Task.AcceptTalk: Tiep theo hay den tim de tu<color=#FFCC00> Thien Vuong Bang </color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Bui Vien </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#FFCC00> Thien Vuong Bang </color>Bang chung da so song bang nghe canh nong, khong chen vao chuyen giang ho, tham chi rat it tiep xuc voi the gioi ben ngoai. Vua khang Tong, vua chong Kim, khong lam dieu ac, ta chanh phan minh.

Task.Title: Bai kien de tu Duong Mon
Task.AcceptTalk: Tiep theo hay den tim de tu<color=#FFCC00> Duong Mon </color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Duong Te Dan </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Duoc khai sang boi gia toc ho Duong va hung cu mot vung<color=#FFCC00> Tu Xuyen - Ba Thuc </color>rong lon, mon phai lung danh giang ho da hon tram nam nho vao so truong su dung am khi va co quan cua minh.

Task.Title: Bai kien de tu Ngu Doc
Task.AcceptTalk: Tiep theo hay den tim de tu<color=#FFCC00> Ngu Doc </color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Bien Nhat Xuan </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Noi<color=#FFCC00> Ngu Doc Giao </color> hung cu la nui Ngu Doc noi mien Tay Vuc xa xoi it nguoi biet toi. Day la mot giao phai than bi, nguoi trong Giang ho goi la sac bien. Nguyen tac cua Ngu Doc Giao la “Loi ich quyet dinh ban thu”, co loi moi lam, can ban la khong quan bat ke chuyen thi phi chinh ta nao.

Task.Title: Bai kien de tu Nga Mi
Task.AcceptTalk: Tiep theo hay den tim de tu<color=#FFCC00> Nga Mi </color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Huyen Tinh </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Tong Da cua phai toa lac tren nui<color=#FFCC00> Nga Mi </color> tinh Tu Xuyen, lai nam tren thanh dia Phat giao nen lay ten do ma dat thanh ten mon phai cua minh.

Task.Title: Bai kien de tu Thuy Yen
Task.AcceptTalk: Tiep theo hay den tim de tu<color=#FFCC00> Thuy Yen </color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> To Nha </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: La mot mon phai than bi nam doc theo Nhi Hai, vung nui Diem son (thuoc nuoc Dai Ly) va giap bien cuong Van Nam xa xoi.

Task.Title: Bai kien de tu Cai Bang
Task.AcceptTalk: Tiep theo hay den tim de tu<color=#FFCC00> Cai Bang </color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> La Tuan </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Lich su<color=#FFCC00> Cai Bang </color>co the noi la tu rat lau doi, danh xung “Thien Ha De Nhat Bang” khong phai tu nhien ma co. Nho tinh than quat cuong va nhan so dong dao, phai nay luon chiem mot vi tri dang ke trong vo lam Trung Nguyen.

Task.Title: Bai kien de tu Thien Nhan
Task.AcceptTalk: Tiep theo hay den tim de tu<color=#FFCC00> Thien Nhan Giao </color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Ta Phi Kinh </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#FFCC00> Thien Nhan Giao </color>lay khu vuc son coc Vu Linh Son lam dai ban doanh, Thien Nhan giao la mot to chuc duoc Kim quoc bao tro nham muc dich doi pho voi vo lam Trung Nguyen Thien Nhan giao von khong co lap truong Chanh - Ta.

Task.Title: Bai kien de tu Vo Dang
Task.AcceptTalk: Tiep theo hay den tim de tu<color=#FFCC00> Vo Dang </color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Minh Tue </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#FFCC00> Vo Dang </color>son con goi la Thai Hoa son duoc menh danh la : "Trung Quoc dao giao danh son” nam o phia Tay Bac tinh Ho Bac. Phia Bac giap Tan Linh Phia Nam giap Ba Son, nui non trap trung doc ngang hon 400 dam

Task.Title: Bai kien de tu Con Lon
Task.AcceptTalk: Tiep theo hay den tim de tu<color=#FFCC00> Con Lon </color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Quy Kinh Tinh </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Nho hong phuoc cua tien nhan, cac vi chuong mon ke tiep deu co tai luoc, khong ngung lam lon manh<color=#FFCC00> Con Lon Phai </color> khien no dan tro thanh mon phai lon trong Giang ho, hung cu Tay vuc, cung tranh quyen voi cac dai mon phai.

Task.Title: Bai kien de tu Hoa Son
Task.AcceptTalk: Tiep theo hay den tim de tu<color=#FFCC00> Hoa Son </color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Tat Minh </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Lich su phai<color=#FFCC00> Hoa Son </color>da rat lau doi, tuong truyen bat dau tu Duong Ba Kieu thoi Xuan Thu da co nguoi len dinh Hoa Son dung leu kho hoc. Con chau Duong Thi doi nao cung co nguoi xuat sac, truyen den Duong Kien trieu Tuy da la van dinh thien ha. Ve sau tuy suy yeu nhung khong the xem nhe.

Task.Title: Bai Kien Long Ngu
Task.DoingTalk: Quay ve tim gap<color=#FFCC00> Long Ngu </color>o Tan Thu Thon.
Task.CompleteTalk: Bang huu da dua ra duoc quyet dinh cho minh chua?

Task.Title: Gia Nhap Mon Phai
Task.DoingTalk: Gia nhap mot mon phai bat ky roi quay ve tim gap<color=#FFCC00> Long Ngu </color>o Tan Thu Thon.
Task.CompleteTalk: Chuc mung bang huu da hoc duoc vo cong thuong thua, tien do rong mo dang cho bang huu..........!

Task.Title: Qua cua Long Ngu
Task.AcceptTalk: Khoi dau rat tot, hay tang cap chieu thuc va su dung de tieu diet Kim Mieu giup thon dan.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet Kim Mieu o ngoai thon.
Task.CompleteTalk: Kha lam. Bang huu hay mua mot binh khi tot tai tho ren Bao Thu, den tan thu thon khong the tay khong duoc dau.

Task.Title: Tim Vo Su
Task.AcceptTalk: Gio bang huu da co vo hoc ho than, ta khong phai lo lang nua, hay tim<color=#FFCC00> Vo Su </color>ong ta co viec can bang huu giup.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Vo Su </color>o ngoai thon
Task.CompleteTalk: Dan<color=#FF0000> Kim Mieu </color>van con tan du o trong o cua chung, that la nguy hiem tiem tang.

Task.Title: Hang O Kim Mieu
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang huu hay truy tim hang o va tieu diet het bon chung.
Task.DoingTalk: Tim hang o<color=#FF0000> Kim Mieu </color>va tieu diet chung.
Task.CompleteTalk: Haha,bang huu that vat va, moi lo tiem tang nay da duoc giai quyet.

Task.Title: Gap Long Ngu
Task.AcceptTalk: Viec cua ta da xong, bang huu hay quay ve di, sau nay co viec ta se tim bang huu!
Task.DoingTalk: Quay ve tim<color=#FFCC00> Long Ngu </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#FF0000> Kim Mieu </color>luon la noi lo cua thon dan, nay da khong con ban tam nua roi!

Task.Title: Giup Than Bi Thuong Nhan
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#FFCC00> Than Bi Thuong Nhan </color>tren duong buon thuoc quy hiem gap su co, hay den giup ong ta.
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Than Bi Thuong Nhan</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Thieu hiep den tu<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen </color>?<color=#FFCC00> Long Ngu </color>that co long!

Task.Title: Tim kiem Thao Duoc
Task.AcceptTalk: Hay giup ta thu thap chut thao duoc
Task.DoingTalk: <color=#FFCC00>Thao Duoc </color>o ngoai thanh<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong</color>. Hay di thu thap.
Task.CompleteTalk: Thieu hiep qua la van vo toan tai do nha, tai hai thuoc cung rat tuyet !

Task.Title: Tieu Diet Nhim
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta phai mang do ve roi, bang huu di duong can than nhe. Gan day co nhieu ten gia ma gia quy hai nguoi lam day.
Task.DoingTalk: Tren duong di den<color=#FFCC00> Thien Vuong Bang </color>tieu diet 20 con nhim.
Task.CompleteTalk: That loi hai! Bang huu tu xa den day phai khong?

Task.Title: Tim Gai Nhim
Task.AcceptTalk: Su thuc ta bi dau tai, can it Gai Nhim de chua tri, hay thu thap giup ta va dem den cho ong ay.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet<color=#FF0000> Nhim </color>lay gai va dua den cho<color=#FFCC00> Lo Van Vien</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: That may man khi co bang huu giup ta thu thap nhung vi thuoc nay.

Task.Title: Hoi Tham Duong Ho
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta con mot chuyen can nguoi giup do.
Task.DoingTalk: di tim<color=#FFCC00> Duong Ho </color>chuyen loi.

Task.Title: Co Gioi Tien Sinh
Task.AcceptTalk: Da khong con viec gi nua, dai hiep khong lam phien ngai them nua!
Task.DoingTalk: Tim gap<color=#FFCC00> Co Gioi Tien Sinh </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Chao dai hiep, cau da den!

Task.Title: Cuong Hoa 1/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Dai Hiep, trang bi cua nguoi khong duoc tot. Den gap<color=#FFCC00> Da Luyen Dai Su </color>ong ta co the giup duoc nguoi
Task.DoingTalk: tim<color=#FFCC00> Da Luyen Dai Su </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Dai Hiep ,cau can ta giup chuyen gi?

Task.Title: Cuong Hoa 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Cuong Hoa trang bi vua co the tang thuoc tinh con co the nhan duoc phan thuong moc Cuong Hoa hien thi ben duoi cung cua trang bi. Bang huu hay thu Cuong Hoa mot lan...
Task.DoingTalk: Doi thoai voi<color=#FFCC00> Da Luyen</color>, chon muc Cuong Hoa Vat Pham sau do chon do muon cuong hoa.
Task.CompleteTalk: Tot lam, suc manh thuoc tinh trang bi da dc nang cap, bang huu hay thu thap them huyen tinh de co the Cuong Hoa cap cao hon.

Task.Title: Khao Nghiem Cua Da Luyen Dai Su
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta co mot so cau hoi cho nguoi!
Task.DoingTalk: Tra loi cau hoi cua<color=#FFCC00> Da Luyen Dai Su</color>
Task.QuestionTable: Bang huu muon mua binh sinh luc va noi luc thi phai den dau?|#Truong Tram Kinh Tap Hoa Tho Ren Xa Phu

Task.Title: Tim Chu Truong Tram Kinh
Task.AcceptTalk: Tiep theo hay di tim chu tiem thuoc<color=#FFCC00> Truong Tram Kinh </color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong </color>tim chu tiem thuoc<color=#FFCC00> Truong Tram Kinh</color>.
Task.QuestionTable: Bang huu mua trang bi moi tai dau?|Than Bi Thuong Nhan Vo Lam Truyen Nhan Tho Ren #Tap Hoa
Task.CompleteTalk: Ta chuyen ban cac thao duoc quy, bang huu can loai nao?

Task.Title: Khao Nghiem Cua Chu Truong Tram Kinh
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta co mot so cau hoi cho Bang Huu.
Task.DoingTalk: Tra loi cau hoi cua chu tiem thuoc
Task.QuestionTable: Bang huu mua trang bi moi tai dau?|Than Bi Thuong Nhan Vo Lam Truyen Nhan Tho Ren #Tap Hoa

Task.Title: Tim Chu Tiem Tap Hoa
Task.AcceptTalk: Tiep theo hay di tim chu Tiem Tap Hoa.
Task.QuestionTable: Bang huu biet vi nao ban vu khi khong?|Cong Binh Tu Tien Trang Ban Ngua #Tho Ren

Task.Title: Khao Nghiem Cua Chu Tiem Tap Hoa
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta co mot so khao nghiem danh cho nguoi
Task.DoingTalk: Tra loi cau hoi cua chu tiem Tap Hoa
Task.QuestionTable: Bang huu biet vi nao ban vu khi khong?|Cong Binh Tu Tien Trang Ban Ngua #Tho Ren

Task.Title: Tim Chu Tiem Ren
Task.AcceptTalk: Bay gio nguoi hay di tim Chu Tiem Ren xem ong ta co gi giao pho.
Task.DoingTalk: Di tim Chu Tiem Ren
Task.QuestionTable: Co mot vi chuyen ban cac nguyen lieu va vat pham quy hiem, bang huu biet la ai khong?|#Than Bi Thuong Nhan Vo Lam Truyen Nhan Cong Binh Tu Tien Trang
Task.CompleteTalk: Bang huu can binh khi ra sao hay noi voi ta. Ta co the ren tat ca binh khi tren vo lam.

Task.Title: Khao Nghiem Cua Chu Tiem Ren
Task.AcceptTalk: Truoc tien hay tra loi cau hoi cua ta.
Task.DoingTalk: Tra loi cau hoi cua chu Tiem Ren
Task.QuestionTable: Co mot vi chuyen ban cac nguyen lieu va vat pham quy hiem, bang huu biet la ai khong?|#Than Bi Thuong Nhan Vo Lam Truyen Nhan Cong Binh Tu Tien Trang

Task.Title: Thuong Nhan Da Quy
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang huu co biet ve khoang thach khong? di tim<color=#FFCC00> Than Bi Thuong Nhan </color>de tim hieu.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi Thuong Nhan
Task.CompleteTalk: Noi day co ban cac bao vat thien ha, bang huu co the lua chon tuy y!

Task.Title: Giup Thuong Nhan Tim Hieu
Task.AcceptTalk: Gan day co mot mo khoang moi khai quat, bang huu co the giup ta tim hieu ve mo khoang nay duoc khong?
Task.DoingTalk: Thu thap khoang thach o<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong</color>.

Task.Title: Tim Chu Tiem Tra
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi hay di tim<color=#FFCC00> Chu Tiem Tra </color>de do hoi thong tin.
Task.DoingTalk: Di tim<color=#FFCC00> Chu Tiem Tra </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Mo khoang do cac tang nhan vo tinh phat hien khi trong cay ngoai thanh.

Task.Title: Mo Khoang Trieu Dinh
Task.AcceptTalk: Hien tai do cac tang nhan khai quat, bang huu co the den do de hoi them!
Task.DoingTalk: Tro chuyen voi tu<color=#FFCC00> Tu Vu Phap Su </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Thieu Lam </color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Khai thac mo khoang la chi thi cua thanh chu, thuong nhan co the trao doi voi thanh chu de thu mua, cac tang tu chi ho tro khai thac.

Task.Title: Hoi Bao Thuong Nhan
Task.AcceptTalk: Bac co duoc tu ban khoang thach se xung cong quy, thi chu hay hoi bao voi thuong nhan giup ta.
Task.DoingTalk: Quay ve<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Than Bi Thuong Nhan</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Da ta bang huu da hoi giup ta. Day la chut bao thach mong bang huu khong che!

Task.Title: Uu Tu Cua Co Gioi Tien Sinh
Task.AcceptTalk: Moi viec cua ta da duoc giai quyet,<color=#FFCC00> Co Gioi Tien Sinh </color>gan day hay sau nao, bang huu tham hoi xem sao!
Task.DoingTalk: Tham hoi<color=#FFCC00> Co Gioi Tien Sinh</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Bang huu gan day co ghe ngang<color=#FFCC00> Thieu Lam </color>phai khong? o do dang co chut rac roi....

Task.Title: Trau Rung Noi Loan 1/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Cac tieu tang dang tu hanh gan day, bang huu qua xem ho the nao. Mon phai cua ho co chut rac roi voi Trau Rung, hay giup ho giai quyet.
Task.DoingTalk: Danh bai<color=#FF0000> Trau Rung</color>. o<color=#FFCC00> Thieu Lam</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Ton that lan nay khong nho, ta phai bao voi Chuong Mon, bang huu hay doi ta.

Task.Title: Trau Rung Noi Loan 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Chuong mon chuyen loi cam ta den bang huu va vi<color=#FFCC00> Co Gioi Tien Sinh </color>, ngay sau se bao dap an tinh nay!
Task.DoingTalk: Quay ve<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong </color>bao cao tinh hinh lai cho<color=#FFCC00> Co Gioi Tien Sinh</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Cac tieu tang deu la nguoi cuong dung, vo cong cua ho khong phai hang vua. bang huu con tre ma da giup ho mot an tinh lon, Haha. Tot lam ! Tot lam !

Task.Title: Dung Chien Heo Rung 1/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Heo Rung noi dien pha hoai khap noi trong vung. Bang huu hay giup thon dan danh duoi chung di.
Task.DoingTalk: Danh bai<color=#FF0000> Heo Rung </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Vo Dang Phai</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: bang huu la nguoi<color=#FFCC00> Co Gioi </color>phai den ho tro chung ta, vo cong rat kha.

Task.Title: Dung Chien Heo Rung 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Thay ta cam ta<color=#FFCC00> Co Gioi </color>, khong con viec gi nua bang huu hay yen tam ra ve.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Co Gioi Tien Sinh</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Mon ha cua giao phai nay it tiep xuc voi dan chung, bang huu dung de y loi noi cua ho....

Task.Title: Tram Tuong Doat Ky 1/2
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#FF0000> Tho Phi </color>long hanh, cuop doat cua dan ngheo, sao huyet o canh nui<color=#FFCC00> Con Lon </color>, hay giup ta tieu diet chung bao ve nguoi dan.
Task.DoingTalk: Danh bai<color=#FF0000> Tho Phi At </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Huong Thuy Dong</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Danh hay lam, thua thang xong thang len danh bai tan du con lai cua chung !

Task.Title: Tram Tuong Doat Ky 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Dong dang cua chung da rut lui sau vao trong dong, hay tien vao tieu diet nhung ten con lai.
Task.DoingTalk: Danh bai<color=#FF0000> Tho Phi Giap </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Huong Thuy Dong</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Bon tho phi nay long hanh da lau, nho bang huu ra tay tuong tro, sau nay can giup do xin dung ngai!

Task.Title: Anh Hung Tro Lai 1/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Loan da dep yen, duong di xa xoi, bang huu hay khoi hanh keo muon, giup ta chuyen loi hoi tham den<color=#FFCC00> Co Gioi Tien Sinh </color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Tro ve bao tin cho<color=#FFCC00> Co Gioi Tien Sinh</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Xem dang ve phong tran cua bang huu chac di duong rat vat va? Mau vao thanh nghi ngoi!

Task.Title: Anh Hung Tro Lai 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Sau mot thoi gian lich luyen chac bang huu cung tich tru vo so vat pham, hay den gap thu kho<color=#FFCC00> Trau Duc Khoai </color>de cat giu, ong ay rat dang tin cay de pho thac.
Task.DoingTalk: Gui vat pham vao thu kho o<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Tai ha chuyen luu tru vat pham, bang huu can ta giup luu tru vat pham gi hay dat vao kho, ta se bao quan nguyen ven.

Task.Title: Anh Hung Tro Lai 3/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Giup ta trao tra vat pham cua<color=#FFCC00> Long Ngu </color>gui da lau va hoi tham suc khoe cua ong ay. Truoc day ong ay la mot dai hiep, tung hoanh tu phuong nay da lui ve song tu do tu tai....
Task.DoingTalk: Dua tui do cho<color=#FFCC00> Long Ngu </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Khong ngo nhung thu nay qua mot thoi gian dai van con nguyen ven,<color=#FFCC00> Trau Duc Khoai </color> that danh bat hu truyen, da ta bang huu da mang ve day cho ta!

Task.Title: Anh Hung Tro Lai 4/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Gan day vo cong bang huu da tien bo khong it, hy vong mot ngay khong xa co the giao luu voi bang huu. Thon trang gan day rat yen binh, ta co du cam khong tot, can de phong moi truong hop xay ra.
Task.DoingTalk: Quay lai<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Co Gioi Tien Sinh</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Tro lai roi a! Moi viec o<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang </color>van on chu, tinh hinh chien loan dang cang thang, hy vong thon dan khong bi anh huong boi the su.

Task.Title: Anh Tai Xuat Chung 1/7
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#FFCC00> Trau Duc Khoai </color>co viec muon gap bang huu, hay den gap ong ay ngay di!
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi thu kho<color=#FFCC00> Trau Duc Khoai</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Lan truoc gap ta da biet bang huu bat pham, su gia dang co dot tuyen chon, bang huu tham gia thu xem...

Task.Title: Tuyen Chon Anh Tai 2/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Trung Nguyen hien nay that nhieu moi nguy,<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong </color>ta nay phai het long chieu mo nguoi tai .Bang huu hay mau den tim<color=#FFCC00> Su Gia Lien Dau </color>de duoc bao danh !
Task.DoingTalk: Chao hoi<color=#FFCC00> Su Gia Lien Dau </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Vi vinh quang cua<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong </color>! Hay giup trieu dinh tieu diet loan tac, cac vi se co phan thuong.

Task.Title: Tuyen Chon Anh Tai 3/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Loan tac<color=#FF0000> Dong Chuy </color>rat gian xao, bang huu hay can than muu ke cua chung.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet<color=#FF0000> Dong Chuy </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Tien Cuc Dong</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Bang huu khong bi thuong chu?<color=#FF0000> Dong Chuy </color>da tieu diet, nhung moi hoa nay van chua dut.

Task.Title: Tuyen Chon Anh Tai 4/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Van con mot dam loan dang lan tron trong dong, mot thon dan tung phat hien duoc bon chung, bang huu den gap ho hoi them ve hanh tung cua chung.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Than Nong Lao Gia</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Dai hiep muon hoi ve dam nguoi chung ta gap luc truoc? ...........

Task.Title: Tuyen Chon Anh Tai 5/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Bon chung trong rat du ton, chung ta khong dam lai gan. Chung rat dong, tu tap sau trong dong, mong dai hiep hay tieu diet chung giup nguoi dan.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet<color=#FF0000> Bao Hoang </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Tien Cuc Dong</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Dai hiep vo cong that cao cuong! Lao khong co gi bao dap, nhung co mot bi mat se noi cho dai hiep.

Task.Title: Tuyen Chon Anh Tai 6/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Mot lan di nhat cui, lao vo tinh phat hien mot vuon cay la. Lao nong hieu biet han hep nen khong biet do la loai gi, dai hiep hay den do xem do la loai thao duoc gi.
Task.DoingTalk: Thu thap<color=#FFCC00> Linh Chi </color>o ngoai thanh<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Lao that khong ngo la<color=#FFCC00> Linh Chi </color>trong loi don dai, lao chi nhan mot phan, dai hiep hay giu lay.

Task.Title: Tuyen Chon Anh Tai 7/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Dai hiep da giup dan giai tieu diet ac nhan, lai giup lao dao<color=#FFCC00> Linh Chi </color>, dai an khong quen, mong ngay sau gap lai....
Task.DoingTalk: Mang<color=#FFCC00> Linh Chi </color>den cho<color=#FFCC00> Su Gia Lien Dau</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#FFCC00> Linh Chi </color>tram nam rat hiem,bang huu that su tang cho ta sao?

Task.Title: Thuoc Tri Thuong Cua Su Gia 1/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang huu hay giup ta dieu che thanh<color=#FFCC00> Linh Dan </color>, ong chu hieu thuoc co don phuong co the giup ta, bang huu hay tim gap ong ay.
Task.DoingTalk: Gap chu hieu thuoc o<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Dan phuong dieu che da bi trom mat. Neu bang huu tim lai duoc ta se dieu che giup, xem nhu tra no an tinh cho bang huu.

Task.Title: Thuoc Tri Thuong Cua Su Gia 2/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Truoc day ta da nho<color=#FFCC00> Thanh Lien Tu </color>truy tim tung tich cua ke trom, hay den gap han de tim them manh moi, ta cho tin cua bang huu!
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Con Lon Phai </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Thanh Lien Tu</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Thieu hiep la nguoi do<color=#FFCC00> Tram Kinh </color>tien cu? Ke trom rat gian xao, than thu cao cuong.

Task.Title: Thuoc Tri Thuong Cua Su Gia 3/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta tung giao thu voi han, than phap cua han rat nhanh ta khong the bat duoc, han chay ve huong<color=#FFCC00> Huong Thuy Dong </color>, thieu hiep nen can than.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu Diet<color=#FF0000> Tho Phi At </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Huong Thuy Dong</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Lao dai cua bon chung dang giu dan phuong? Vat thi rat kho khan...............

Task.Title: Thuoc Tri Thuong Cua Su Gia 4/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Lao dai cua chung co tieng ac nhan, vo cong khong phai tam thuong, bang huu se rat kho khan de lay lai dan phuong tu han.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu Diet<color=#FF0000> Luu Luong </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Huong Thuy Dong</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: That khong ngo, vo cong cua thieu hiep qua khong tam thuong, tai ha da duoc mo rong tam mat.

Task.Title: Thuoc Tri Thuong Cua Su Gia 5/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Dan phuong den tay roi, thieu hiep hay mang ve cho<color=#FFCC00> Tram Kinh </color>, han dang rat mong tin cua thieu hiep.
Task.DoingTalk: Tro ve<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong </color>tim chu tiem thuoc<color=#FFCC00> Truong Tram Kinh</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: That khong phu ky vong cua ta, bang huu cho ta nhe, ta se di dieu che linh dan ngay.

Task.Title: Thuoc Tri Thuong Cua Su Gia 6/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Day la thuoc cua thieu hiep,<color=#FFCC00> Linh Dan </color>la mot loai thuoc rat quy, nhung thoi gian bao quan khong duoc lau, bang huu hay giao ngay cho<color=#FFCC00> Su Gia </color>dai nhan.
Task.DoingTalk: Dua thuoc cho<color=#FFCC00> Su Gia Lien Dau</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Bang huu ve that kip thoi, ta dang can linh dan ngay luc nay de dieu tri vet thuong, vet thuong nay da theo ta rat nhieu nam, mot cau chuyen cu.........

Task.Title: Tiep Ung Cai Bang 1/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Dung linh dan vet thuong cua ta da do nhieu roi, that cam ta bang huu da giup ta lay thuoc. Truoc khi xuat hanh bang huu hay den gap<color=#FFCC00> Co Gioi Tien Sinh </color>ngai ay co viec muon dan do .
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Co Gioi Tien Sinh</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Vet thuong cua<color=#FFCC00> Su Gia </color>dai nhan van on chu! Ta co mot nhiem vu cho bang huu....

Task.Title: Tiep Ung Cai Bang 2/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Hay mau den<color=#FFCC00> Cai Bang </color>, o do dang can them nhan si de chong choi voi nan soi hoang, truoc tien hay den hieu thuoc nhan chut vat pham tiep te dua sang cho ho.
Task.DoingTalk: Nhan vat pham tiep te o Hieu Thuoc
Task.CompleteTalk: Bang huu cung chuan bi di cuu vien<color=#FFCC00> Cai Bang </color>? Day la chut vat pham tiep te cua ta. Phong tuyen noi do dang rat cang thang, ta mong bang huu hay chuan bi tot

Task.Title: Tiep Ung Cai Bang 3/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Soi la giong loai rat hung hang va thuong di chuyen theo bay dan, hay can than khi doi dau voi bon chung, bang huu di duong binh an!
Task.DoingTalk: Dua tiep te cho<color=#FFCC00> La Khuong Sinh </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Cai Bang</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Da ta thieu hiep, chong choi voi dan soi nay nhan luc phia ta bi thuong rat nhieu, that su thieu nhung vat pham tri thuong nay!

Task.Title: Tiep Ung Cai Bang 4/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Kien dong can chet voi, bon quai vat noi nay rat dong lai luon rinh rap tan cong, nhan si cai bang da bi thuong phan lon, mong thieu hiep tuong tro.
Task.DoingTalk: Danh bai dan<color=#FF0000> Soi Do </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Cai Bang</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Hao cong phu ! Danh hay lam! Nguoi den tu<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong </color>khong ai tam thuong ca, ta da duoc mo rong tam mat . Hahaha!

Task.Title: Tiep Ung Cai Bang 5/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Thanh<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong </color>ngoa ho tang long, thay ta cam ta<color=#FFCC00> Co Gioi Tien Sinh </color>, lan sau co co hoi ta se dich than gap ong ay.
Task.DoingTalk: Bao tin ve<color=#FFCC00> Co Gioi Tien Sinh </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Bang huu lam tot lam, that khong phu ky vong cua ta, ta co nhiem vu khac mong bang huu tiep nhan.

Task.Title: Ren Luyen Than The 1/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang huu da loi hai hon nhieu roi, viec can thiet hien tai la ren luyen than the, nang cao suc manh cua nhuc the se giup tang manh ve phong thu. Ta biet mot noi co the giup bang huu ren luyen .
Task.DoingTalk: Danh bai<color=#FF0000> Soi Tuyet </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Phuc Nguu Son</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Tot lam, vo cong muon tang tien thi can mot nhuc than cung ran, nen tang cang vung chac thi noi luc cang tham hau.

Task.Title: Ren Luyen Than The 2/2
Task.AcceptTalk: Thuong Ung co than thu nhanh nhen, tan cong quy di. Khong it hao thu cua ta bi da thuong, bang huu co the dung no de ren luyen tang thuc luc....
Task.DoingTalk: Danh bai<color=#FF0000> Thuong Ung </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Thanh Thanh Son</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: That khong ngoai du doan cua ta, hien tai bang huu co the nhan nhung thu thach nguy hiem hon, ta tin bang huu van co the bao toan dc ban menh.

Task.Title: Quyen Truc Chien Bao 1/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Quyen truc chien bao da bi quan Kim cuop, bang huu hay den gap de tu cai bang tim hieu nguyen nhan.
Task.DoingTalk: Tim<color=#FFCC00> La Tuan </color>o Ba Lang Huyen
Task.CompleteTalk: Bang huu do<color=#FFCC00> Co Gioi Tien Sinh </color>phai den phai khong! tinh hinh dang rat nguy cap! Quyen truc chua dung thong tin quan trong ve quan ta, can phai mang ve.

Task.Title: Quyen Truc Chien Bao 2/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Truong lao Cai Bang di dieu tra ve quan Kim da tro lai, bang huu hay den do gap ong ay.
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Cai Bang </color>gap<color=#FFCC00> Nguy Lieu Ong</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Trong qua trinh theo doi chung,den<color=#FFCC00> Thanh Thanh Son </color>quan Kim gap tap kich tai lung chung nui, khong mot ke nao song xot, la mot dam quai dieu.................

Task.Title: Quyen Truc Chien Bao 3/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta de lai mot nguoi de theo doi hanh tung bon quai dieu, hay den day han se chi to quai dieu cho bang huu.
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Thanh Thanh Son </color>gap De tu<color=#FFCC00> Cai Bang</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Bon chung da giet toan bo binh linh Kim quoc va an thit ho. Quyen truc van trong to cua bon chung.

Task.Title: Quyen Truc Chien Bao 4/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Dam quai vat nay dang chuan bi di tim thuc an, bang huu hay cho thoi co tan cong luc chung khong tap trung, quyen truc phai duoc thu hoi.
Task.DoingTalk: Danh bai<color=#FF0000> Ken Ken </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Thanh Thanh Son</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Bang huu lam tot lam, lu quai dieu da so hay bo chay, quyen truc da thu thap hoi du roi chu.

Task.Title: Quyen Truc Chien Bao 5/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Quyen truc da ve tay, bang huu cap toc giao lai cho truong lao, ta se o lai theo doi them. Len duong binh an!
Task.DoingTalk: Giao quyen truc cho<color=#FFCC00> Nguy Lieu Ong</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Qua tot! qua tot! vat pham nay lien quan den an nguy cua muon dan, bang huu da giup do dan chung mot viec lon.

Task.Title: Quyen Truc Chien Bao 6/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang huu giup ta thong bao cho<color=#FFCC00> La Tuan </color>, han dang rat lo lang ve quyen truc.
Task.DoingTalk: Bao tin cho<color=#FFCC00> La Tuan </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Bang huu la cuu tinh cua dan chung, bang huu cua<color=#FFCC00> Co Gioi Tien Sinh </color>luon khien ta phai nguoc nhin.

Task.Title: Quyen Truc Chien Bao 7/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang huu chac han da met moi nhieu, hay nghi ngoi roi quay lai bao tin cho<color=#FFCC00> Co Gioi Tien Sinh </color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Bao tin cho<color=#FFCC00> Co Gioi Tien Sinh </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Ngoai bang huu ra, khong ai co the hoan thanh tot nhiem vu nguy hiem nay.

Task.Title: Tham Quan Bien Kinh 1/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Gan day<color=#FFCC00> Bien Kinh </color>rat nhon nhip,<color=#FFCC00> Bien Kinh </color>la thanh lon phia bac, bang huu thuong xuyen ghe tham de hoc hoi van hoa cua nguoi phuong bac. Hay gap<color=#FFCC00> Xa Phu </color>, ong ta se giup bang huu chuan bi mot con ngua tot.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Xa Phu </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#FFCC00> Bien Kinh </color>la trung tam giao dich cua phuong bac, ngoai mua ban cac vat pham dac thu, con co trao doi tin tuc quan trong.

Task.Title: Tham Quan Bien Kinh 2/8
Task.AcceptTalk: O<color=#FFCC00> Bien Kinh </color>ta quen mot co nuong se dan ngai di dao tham quan, ngai cung co the hoi tham tin tuc tu cac nang.
Task.DoingTalk: Khoi hanh den<color=#FFCC00> Bien Kinh </color>gap<color=#FFCC00> Binh Binh Co Nuong</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Chao dai hiep, ngai moi den chac con la lam ve noi day! Thanh<color=#FFCC00> Bien Kinh </color>la mot trong tam dai thanh thi, luong hang hoa cung nhu tin tuc la vo cung lon.

Task.Title: Tham Quan Bien Kinh 3/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Dai hiep di dao quanh thanh de biet them ve van hoa noi day, se khong lam ngai that vong.
Task.DoingTalk: Noii chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Tho Ren</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Tho ren tai<color=#FFCC00> Bien Kinh </color>co tay nghe tot nhat trong tam dai thanh thi, ho da ren ra nhung vu khi co tieng tam nhu,<color=#FF0000> Pha Thien Kich </color>,<color=#FF0000> Huyen Thiet Kiem </color>.........

Task.Title: Tham Quan Bien Kinh 4/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Ngoai binh khi,<color=#FFCC00> Bien Kinh </color>con co nhung mat hang tieng tam khac, neu can ren binh khi dai hiep hay den tim ta.
Task.DoingTalk: Tim va noi chuyen voi chu<color=#FFCC00> Tiem Thuoc</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Thao duoc phuong bac da dang, co the dieu che ra nhieu loai thuoc dac hieu chi co ban tai phuong bac.

Task.Title: Tham Quan Bien Kinh 5/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Ben canh ta cung co mot so mat hang vai voc, khi can thuoc tot dai hiep hay den tim ta.
Task.DoingTalk: Doi thoai voi<color=#FFCC00> Chu Tiem Tap Hoa</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Trang bi cho ta ban noi danh khap thanh<color=#FFCC00> Bien Kinh </color>, ngoai ra ta cung thu mua nguyen vat lieu voi gia tot, dai hiep hay can nhac.

Task.Title: Tham Quan Bien Kinh 6/8
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#FFCC00> Bien Kinh </color>co nhung thuong nhan buon ngua, dai hiep co the tim cho minh mot thu cuoi ung y.
Task.DoingTalk: Doi thoai voi<color=#FFCC00> Ban Ngua </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Bien Kinh</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Ta co the cung cap mot so luong lon thu cuoi cho dai hiep, ngoai ra con mot so ngua quy, dai hiep can rat nhieu bac de mua duoc chung!

Task.Title: Tham Quan Bien Kinh 7/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Dai hiep chac la nguoi moi den, dai hiep nen ghe qua<color=#FFCC00> Thu Kho </color>, ong ay tiep xuc rat nhieu nguoi o day, co le dai hiep se thich tinh cach ong ay.
Task.DoingTalk: Doi thoai voi<color=#FFCC00> Trau Duc Khoai</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Xin chao dai hiep, nguoi moi den day phai khong?<color=#FFCC00> Bien Kinh </color>dat rong, nguoi dong dai hiep can dieu gi co the tim ta.

Task.Title: Tham Quan Bien Kinh 8/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Dai hiep co the quay lai sau neu can, hien tai nguoi can lam quen voi cuoc song nhon nhip noi day.
Task.DoingTalk: Tro ve gap<color=#FFCC00> Binh Binh Co Nuong</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Dai hiep cam thay the nao, cuoc song noi phon hoa luon lam nhung nguoi moi den ngo ngang.

Task.Title: Giup Do Truong Qua Phu 1/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Noi day dia linh nhan kiet, cac loai thao duoc quy hiem co the bat gap bat cu dau o ngoai thanh, ngai co the giup ta tim mot it<color=#FFCC00> Nhan Sam </color>khong?
Task.DoingTalk: Giup<color=#FFCC00> Binh Binh Co Nuong </color>thu thap<color=#FFCC00> Nhan Sam</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Dai hiep lam viec that nhanh gon, gan day<color=#FFCC00> Truong Qua Phu </color>cung co nhieu viec can giup do, nhung phu quan ba ay da qua doi.......

Task.Title: Giup Do Truong Qua Phu 2/5
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#FFCC00> Truong Qua Phu </color>la lang gieng cua ta rat lau roi, mong dai hiep hay giup do ba ta mot so viec.
Task.DoingTalk: Di tim<color=#FFCC00> Truong Qua Phu</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Dai Hiep den tu<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong </color>! Noi do cung sinh ra nhieu vi anh kiet noi danh vo lam.

Task.Title: Giup Do Truong Qua Phu 3/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Gan day trong nha da khong con luong thuc, ta than la nu nhi khong the mot minh ra ngoai tim duoc, ngai co the giup ta khong?
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet<color=#FF0000> Doi Xam </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Thien Nhan Giao</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Dai Hiep that tot bung! Co viec gi ta co the giup do xin dai hiep cu noi, may va nau nuong ta deu co the giup.

Task.Title: Giup Do Truong Qua Phu 4/5
Task.AcceptTalk: Thay ta cam ta long tot cua<color=#FFCC00> Binh Binh Co Nuong </color>, da ta va chuc dai hiep len duong binh an!
Task.DoingTalk: Quay lai tim<color=#FFCC00> Binh Binh Co Nuong </color>de chuyen loi
Task.CompleteTalk: Hai tu cua<color=#FFCC00> Truong Qua Phu </color>rat thich an thit<color=#FF0000> Heo Rung </color>, neu co the dai hiep hay tim mot chut tang cho no.

Task.Title: Giup Do Truong Qua Phu 5/5
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#FF0000> Heo Rung </color>la loai vat co rat nhieu o chan nui<color=#FFCC00> Vo Dang </color>, chung rat hung hang, co the de doa den nguoi di duong.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet<color=#FF0000> Heo Rung </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Vo Dang</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Dai Hiep that chu dao! Thit heo nay hai tu nha ta rat thich! Gan day ta nghe duoc mot so chuyen phia bac thanh.

Task.Title: Ac Thu Can Duong 1/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Trong thanh dan chung truyen tai nhau, co mot so ac thu dang gay nguy hiem cho nguoi dan khi di ngang nui<color=#FFCC00> Hoa Son </color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Di tim<color=#FFCC00> Binh Binh Co Nuong </color>hoi chuyen.
Task.CompleteTalk: Qua that co tin tuc nhu vat! Cu the dam ac thu do hoat dong o tren<color=#FFCC00> Diem Thuong Son </color>.

Task.Title: Ac Thu Can Duong 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Dai hiep di men theo loi mon den thung lung co the bat gap chung, do la tuyen duong buon cua cac thuong nhan.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet<color=#FF0000> Nhan Kinh Xa </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Diem Thuong Son</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Chung la loai ran doc, co chut linh tri, rat nguy hiem, may nho co dai hiep thu phuc.

Task.Title: Ac Thu Can Duong 3/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Nhung ac thu do khong chi la nhung con ran doc, ngai hay noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Chu Tiem Do Co </color>, ong ta cung la nan nhan cua ac thu<color=#FFCC00> Diem Thuong Son </color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Chu Tiem Do Co</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Mot doan tuy tung cua ta da bi tan cong, ton that khong he nho, chung di theo tung dan, tan cong moi phia. Da chung rat day, binh khi cua chung ta khong the ton thuong duoc chung, mong dai hiep ra tay truong nghia.

Task.Title: Ac Thu Can Duong 4/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Theo ha nhan cua ta ke lai, chung thuong tap trung tai gan tuyen duong buon hang cua thuong nhan, dai hiep den ngoi nha hoang se thay chung.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet<color=#FF0000> Xa Li </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Diem Thuong Son</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Da ta dai hiep da tra thu giup nhung ha nhan gap nan cua ta, dai hiep sau nay can gi giup do hay den tim ta.

Task.Title: Ket Giao Voi Dai Nhan Vat 1/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta nghe noi ong<color=#FFCC00> Chu Song Bac </color>xin gap dai hiep. Dai hiep co the tu cho han biet them nhieu thong tin co ich!
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Chu Song Bac </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Bien Kinh</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Tram nghe khong bang mat thay! dai hiep khi chat phi pham, qua la mot quy nhan. Ta co chut viec nho muon dai hiep giup do.

Task.Title: Ket Giao Voi Dai Nhan Vat 2/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Tieng tam cua dai hiep da vang danh khap<color=#FFCC00> Bien Kinh </color>, tren<color=#FFCC00> Diem Thuong Son </color>ngoai ac thu con co mot loai khi hiem, da cua chung rat tot. Dai hiep co the giup ta thu thap khong?
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet<color=#FF0000> Hac Diep Hau </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Diem Thuong Son</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Chat luong da rat tot, ta co the lam duoc nhieu vat pham gia tri tu chung, da ta dai hiep!

Task.Title: Ket Giao Voi Dai Nhan Vat 3/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Tai thanh<color=#FFCC00> Bien Kinh </color>, dai hiep muon gay dung cho dung cho minh truoc tien can biet tim dong minh. Ta se chi diem giup dai hiep , dau tien phai ke den<color=#FFCC00> Dich Dung Thuat Si </color>, han la mot trong nhung ke dung dau cuong dao o<color=#FFCC00> Bien Kinh </color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Dich Dung Thuat Si</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Nguoi la nguoi moi noi danh gan day? Noi day hoa no hoa tan chi chop nhoang, nguoi nen bao trong!

Task.Title: Ket Giao Voi Dai Nhan Vat 4/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi giup ta mot viec, ta se gioi thieu nguoi voi ban cua ta, ong ta se giup ich rat nhieu cho nguoi moi nhu nguoi.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Vuong Phu Nhan</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Nguoi rat khoi ngo, co muon lam ha nhan ben canh ta khong?

Task.Title: Ket Giao Voi Dai Nhan Vat 5/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta chi dua voi nguoi mot chut thoi! Bao voi thuat si ta se bao dap khi han den day choi.
Task.DoingTalk: Tro ve gap<color=#FFCC00> Dich Dung Thuat Si</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Tot!<color=#FFCC00> Vuong Phu Nhan </color>la nguoi rat hao phong, ba ta tuy la phan nu nhi, nhung la chu nhan thuc su cua thanh lau lon nhat<color=#FFCC00> Bien Kinh Nay </color>nay.

Task.Title: Ket Giao Voi Dai Nhan Vat 6/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Den thanh lau chac nguoi da gap qua<color=#FFCC00> Hoang Dai Thieu </color>, han la con trai lon cua vien ngoai. Moi tin tuc trong thanh deu den tai han dau tien, hay tiep can han dieu do se giup ich cho nguoi.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Hoang Dai Thieu</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Nghe danh bang huu da lau! vo cong thuong thua! than phap nhanh nhen. That han hanh duoc ket giao voi cac ha.

Task.Title: Tuyet Pham Binh Khi 1/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Ban su ta khong thich dai dong, ta co mot nhiem vu. Ta dang can mot thanh binh khi tot, nguoi am hieu ve vu khi hon ta, hay giup ta tim mot thanh binh khi tot.
Task.DoingTalk: Di tim<color=#FFCC00> Tho Ren </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Bien Kinh</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Binh khi tot ta co the che tao, nhung truoc tien ta can mot it nguyen lieu, bang huu hay giup ta thu thap chung.

Task.Title: Tuyet Pham Binh Khi 2/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Binh khi cua thiet trao co chua kim loai quy, mot trong nhung nguyen lieu ta can, hay di lay ve day.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet<color=#FF0000> Thiet Trao </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Tien Cuc Dong</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Bang huu than thu rat tot, trong thoi gian ngan da thu thap rat nhieu mong vuot cua chung, nhung van con mot so nguyen lieu khac

Task.Title: Tuyet Pham Binh Khi 3/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Song phu cua luu luong cung la thu ta can de tach lay nguyen lieu, hay di thu thap no ve.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet<color=#FF0000> Luu Luong </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Huong Thuy Dong</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Tot lam,<color=#FF0000> Luu Luong </color>noi tieng suc manh cuong bao, khong ngo vo cong cua bang huu loi hai den vay!

Task.Title: Tuyet Pham Binh Khi 4/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Thoi gian ren binh khi kha lau, bang huu co the giup ta mot viec? Giup ta gui vien<color=#FF0000> Ngoc Quy </color>nay cho<color=#FFCC00> Truong Qua Phu </color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Giao qua cho<color=#FFCC00> Truong Qua Phu</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Yen huynh va ta la thanh mai truc ma tu nho, nhung phan nu nhi khong quyet dinh duoc hon su cua minh....

Task.Title: Tuyet Pham Binh Khi 5/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Dai hiep hay chuyen loi den Yen huynh dung cho doi ta nua, da ta dai hiep!
Task.DoingTalk: Tra loi cho<color=#FFCC00> Ha Phi Yen</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Cuoc song khong ai co the nhu y, ta chi hy vong co ay co the yen on song moi ngay, da ta bang huu da giup do ta.

Task.Title: Tuyet Pham Binh Khi 6/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Vu khi cua bang huu da ren xong, day la vu khi ta ung y nhat trong nam nay, hy vong chu nhan cua no se lam nen nghiep lon.
Task.DoingTalk: Giao vu khi cho<color=#FFCC00> Hoang Dai Thieu</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Bang huu khong phu ky vong cua ta, qua that la mot thanh kiem tuyet pham, ta se nghi mot cai ten cho no "<color=#FF0000> Tuyet Pham </color>....."

Task.Title: Cau than 1/4
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#FFCC00> Nga Mi Son </color>, khong biet co bao nhieu thieu nu bi chon chan trong ngon nui phat gia nay. Dem khuya nghi ve hong tran, nghi ve co nhan khong the nao quen.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#FFCC00> Nga Mi </color>gioi luat nghiem ngat. Nhung nam truoc luc o<color=#FFCC00> Thanh Do </color>, tinh co gap go de tu tuc gia<color=#FFCC00> Nga Mi </color>, Tien Tu....

Task.Title: Cau than 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Ngay nho dem mong, khong co cach nao yen giac. Nguoi hay giup ta ket thong gia voi su phu cua<color=#FFCC00> Tien Tu </color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Nga Mi Son </color>tim gap<color=#FFCC00> Bai Nguyet Tien Tu</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#FFCC00> Hoang Dai Thieu </color>? Co nghe<color=#FFCC00> Anh Tuyet </color>nhac den, nhung viec nay tot nhat coi nhu chua tung xay ra, ta bat luan the nao cung khong the dong y.

Task.Title: Cau than 3/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi muon mai moi cho ta thi hay di<color=#FFCC00> Diem Thuong Son </color>giet<color=#FF0000> Hac Diep Hau </color>, Cat tai cua chung, de chung minh thuc luc cua nguoi.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet<color=#FF0000> Hac Diep Hau </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Diem Thuong Son</color>.

Task.Title: Cau than 4/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi noi voi<color=#FFCC00> Hoang Dao Thieu </color>, neu muon cuoi<color=#FFCC00> Anh Tuyet </color>, lay thu cap cua 3 van con<color=#FF0000> Hac Diep </color>, tru hai cho<color=#FFCC00> Nga Mi </color>ta, thi ta se ga Tien Tu cho han.
Task.DoingTalk: Quay ve<color=#FFCC00> Bien Kinh </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Hoang Dai Thieu</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Cai gi! 3 van con, lao ni xao quyet...ro rang ba ta muon lam kho de ta! De ta suy nghi lai.

Task.Title: Nga My Co Su 1/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Da ta bang huu da giup ta, ta se suy nghi ky ve de nghi cua<color=#FFCC00> Bai Nguyet Tien Tu </color>, hen ngay gap lai!
Task.DoingTalk: Tro lai noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Dich Dung Thuat Si</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: 30 nam truoc,<color=#FFCC00> That Tien Tu </color>nui<color=#FFCC00> Nga Mi </color>dung nhan tuyet the lam nghieng nga giang ho, 30 nam doi nguoi thay doi, den nay cau chuyen ve nhung thieu nu do da tro thanh truyen thuyet tuyet dep. Ta luon hy vong tim duoc nhung chuyen xay ra ve sau cua<color=#FFCC00> That Tien Tu </color>.

Task.Title: Nga My Co Su 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Co duyen rat tinh co, mot hom Nga Mi Phai<color=#FFCC00> Thanh Hieu Su Thai </color>xuong nui, khi dang tu hanh bi ke cap lay het tien bac. Trong luc kho khan lai gap duoc ta, ta lien giup do ba ta chut tien. Ve sau moi biet, viec do lien quan den su song con cua<color=#FFCC00> Nga Mi </color>. Cho nen di tim<color=#FFCC00> Thanh Hieu </color>su thai hoi tham, nhan an hue cua ta, ba ta khong the khuoc tu.
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Nga Mi Son </color>tim chuong mon<color=#FFCC00> Thanh Hieu Su Thai</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: A Di Da Phat, thoi duoc, viec nay khong the che giau mai, cu de nguoi luong thien nhu<color=#FFCC00> Thuat Si </color>ghi chep lai cho doi sau.

Task.Title: Nga My Co Su 3/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Sach da giao cho<color=#FFCC00> Nga Mi </color>ha vien cat giu tu lau, nghe noi da bi trom boi<color=#FF0000> Kim To Hau </color>o sau ha vien, nguoi co the di tim thu lai, nhung<color=#FF0000> Kim To Hau </color>tinh nghich xin hay chu y.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet<color=#FF0000> Kim To Hau </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Nga Mi</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Chung rat tinh nghich, hay trom do trong ha vien, nhung chung o day cung da lau, ta cung khong muon thay chung bien mat.

Task.Title: Nga My Co Su 4/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Hay ve bao cho<color=#FFCC00> Thuat Si </color>!
Task.DoingTalk: Tro lai<color=#FFCC00> Bien Kinh </color>bao cao tinh hinh cho<color=#FFCC00> Dich Dung Thuat Si</color>.

Task.Title: Pho Thac Cua Su Thai 1/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi hay di tim<color=#FFCC00> Thanh Hieu Su Thai </color>, xem ba ta co gi pho thac.
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Nga Mi Son </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Thanh Hieu Su Thai</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Dam<color=#FF0000> Xa Li </color>ngay cang qua dang.

Task.Title: Pho Thac Cua Su Thai 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi thay ta di giao huan cho chung mot bai hoc.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet<color=#FF0000> Xa Li </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Diem Thuong Son</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Chung that su co ban linh khong coi ai ra gi, lan nay coi nhu la giao huan mot chut.

Task.Title: Pho Thac Cua Su Thai 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi da giup ta giai quyet rac toi, nhung ta van con mot viec khac nho nguoi, mot nguoi ban cua ta o<color=#FFCC00> Con Lon Phai </color>dang can giup do, hay den do.
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Con Lon Phai </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Than Tuc Lao Nhan</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Vao mot dem mua,<color=#FFCC00> Thu Thach </color>tien sinh mot minh di den tay<color=#FFCC00> Con Lon </color>, lang le vac mot goi do trang tinh, ben trong la tin vat chuong mon cua phai<color=#FFCC00> Con Lon </color>,<color=#FF0000> Lac Anh Than Kiem </color>. Goc gac cua ong ta that than bi, viec nay can phai co cau tra loi.

Task.Title: Lai Lich Tong Thu Thach 1/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Neu noi tren the gian nay con co nguoi biet lai lich cua chuong mon, thi nguoi do khong ai khac chinh la lao tien boi cua<color=#FFCC00> Con Lon </color>la<color=#FFCC00> Dong Tich Nhan </color>.

Task.Title: Lai Lich Tong Thu Thach 2/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Den nha nho cua<color=#FFCC00> Con Lon </color>, tim<color=#FFCC00> Dong Tich Nhan </color>, neu may man, ba ta se ke lai vai dieu.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Dong Tich Nhan </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Con Lon</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Kha kha, khong can noi. Ta da som biet khong som thi muon nguoi cung den tim ta.

Task.Title: Lai Lich Tong Thu Thach 3/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Ve chuyen cua nguoi, nguoi hay den tim de tu cua ta<color=#FFCC00> Ngoc Hoanh Tu </color>, han biet mot nguoi chinh la con gai cua<color=#FFCC00> Tong Thu Thach </color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Ngoc Hoanh Tu</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Con gai<color=#FFCC00> Thu Thach </color>tien sinh<color=#FFCC00> Tong Qua Nhi </color>la nu de tu o day, song duong nhu su phu, dang tham do y tu cua ta.

Task.Title: Lai Lich Tong Thu Thach 4/4
Task.AcceptTalk: Von di,<color=#FFCC00> Thu Thach </color>tien sinh chinh la mon ha cua<color=#FFCC00> Con Lon Phai </color>, nhu the thi qua la may man cho<color=#FFCC00> Con Lon </color>ta roi!
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Chu Khuyet </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Con Lon</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: 10 nam truoc, nhung mon nhan kiet xuat nhat trong<color=#FFCC00> Con Lon </color>la<color=#FFCC00> Tuyen Co Tu </color>,<color=#FFCC00> Thanh Lien Tu </color>,<color=#FFCC00> Ngoc Hoanh Tu </color>xay ra luc duc voi nhau.

Task.Title: Hoa Son Chi Chung 1/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Ho tan sat nhau ma khong phat hien ra co tuyet lo gan do, vo so de tu tinh anh deu bi vui trong nui tuyet.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Dong Tich Nham </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Con Lon</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Mua xuan sap den roi, ta muon de tu trong bang den<color=#FFCC00> Hoa Son </color>de cung te to tien va cho ho biet, cho du kho khan den muc nao cung khong nen lam loan.

Task.Title: Hoa Son Chi Chung 2/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Bi kich do khong duoc tai dien, ta can nguoi giup ta di tien tram xem co nguy hiem gi phat sinh khong!
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Hoa Son </color>tim gap<color=#FFCC00> De Tu Con Lon</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Oi, o day mua dong gia lanh, may hom truoc khong co thit de an, ta len vao<color=#FFCC00> Huong Thuy Dong </color>trom mot it thit tuoi cua bon chung.

Task.Title: Hoa Son Chi Chung 3/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Bon chung rat hung giu, khong can noi nhieu, mau giup ta giai quyet bon ac nhan nay di.
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Huong Thuy Dong </color>day do<color=#FF0000> Luu Luong</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Vi gianh thuc an voi chung, ta bi don vao son coc, cam on bang huu giup ta giai quyet hiem nguy nay.

Task.Title: Hoa Son Chi Chung 4/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi hay den cho<color=#FFCC00> Thon Dan </color>xem can giup gi khong.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Lao Mo Dung</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Nhac them xau ho....Bon<color=#FF0000> Tho Phi </color>that ngang nguoc.

Task.Title: Hoa Son Chi Chung 5/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Lao gia tuoi cao suc yeu khong lam gi duoc. Hy vong nguoi co the giup lao mot tay.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet<color=#FF0000> Tho Phi At </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Huong Thuy Dong</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Vay la lao yen tam roi, sau nay se con con lo lang ve dem, da ta thieu hiep.

Task.Title: Hoa Son Chi Chung 6/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Hay sang noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Tieu Ngu </color>, sau hom di hai thuoc gan hang dong, no luon buon rau.
Task.DoingTalk: Tim<color=#FFCC00> Tieu Ngu</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Oi... Ta quanh nam o tren<color=#FFCC00> Hoa Son </color>nay, ngay ca me cung khong cham soc duoc. May hom truoc ba ay den tham ta. Nhung giua duong bi bon<color=#FF0000> Tho Phi </color>treu choc

Task.Title: Hoa Son Chi Chung 7/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Phien dai hiep giup ta day do bon chung.
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet<color=#FF0000> Tho Phi Giap </color>o<color=#FFCC00> Huong Thuy Dong</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Da ta dai hiep! Bay gio tieu ngu khong so khi di hai thuoc gan dong nua roi.

Task.Title: Hoa Son Chi Chung 8/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Thuc thuc cua ta dang buon ban tai thanh<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong </color>, dai hiep giup ta chuyen loi hoi tham den ong ay nhe!
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Truong Tram Kinh</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Tieu hai tu cua muoi muoi ta tuoi con nho nhung that hieu chuyen!

Task.Title: Y Chi Cua Thanh Chu 1/13
Task.AcceptTalk: Ta thay co tieng phi phi rat la tu phia bac thanh, nguoi di xem ai do tro gi o do.
Task.DoingTalk: Di tim<color=#FFCC00> Cong Binh Tu </color>tham do.
Task.CompleteTalk: Thieu hiep, chung ta gap nhau roi, lan truoc bang huu lap duoc cong lon, moi nguoi deu tan duong bang huu. Ta se cho bang huu mot danh hieu, de xem nao .....

Task.Title: Y Chi Cua Thanh Chu 2/13
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang huu hay chuyen loi canh bao cua ta cho chuong mon cac phai chuan bi phong khi co bien, dau tien hay den<color=#FFCC00> Cai Bang </color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Cai Bang </color>tim chuong mon<color=#FFCC00> Ha Nhan Nga</color>.

Task.Title: Y Chi Cua Thanh Chu 3/13
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Con Lon Phai </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Tuyen Co Tu</color>.

Task.Title: Y Chi Cua Thanh Chu 4/13
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Duong Mon </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Duong Cuu</color>.

Task.Title: Y Chi Cua Thanh Chu 5/13
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Nga Mi Son </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Thanh Hieu Su Thai</color>.

Task.Title: Y Chi Cua Thanh Chu 6/13
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Ngu Doc Giao </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Hac Diem Lang Quan</color>.

Task.Title: Y Chi Cua Thanh Chu 7/13
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Thien Vuong Bang </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Duong Anh</color>.

Task.Title: Y Chi Cua Thanh Chu 8/13
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Thieu Lam </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Thieu Lam Phuong Truong</color>

Task.Title: Y Chi Cua Thanh Chu 9/13
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Thuy Yen </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Doan Ham Yen</color>.

Task.Title: Y Chi Cua Thanh Chu 10/13
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Vo Dang </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Dao Nhat Chan Nhan</color>.

Task.Title: Y Chi Cua Thanh Chu 11/13
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Hoa Son Phai </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Nam Cung Nguyet</color>.

Task.Title: Y Chi Cua Thanh Chu 12/13
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Thien Nhan Giao </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Hoan Nhan Hung Liet</color>.

Task.Title: Y Chi Cua Thanh Chu 13/13
Task.AcceptTalk: Hay quay ve bao tin cua ta cho<color=#FFCC00> Cong Binh Tu </color>dai nhan.
Task.DoingTalk: Tro ve<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Cong Binh Tu</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Moi nguoi deu nhan duoc thong bao cua ta, hien tai chi cho hoi am cua ho ....

Task.Title: Tuyet canh bong lai 1/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Su gia cua chung ta tu<color=#FFCC00> Dai Tong </color>tro ve tren duong gap<color=#FF0000> Soi Trang </color>tan cong, bang huu hay den giup y.
Task.DoingTalk: Giai cuu<color=#FFCC00> Thuong Nhan </color>bi<color=#FF0000> Soi Trang </color>bao vay
Task.CompleteTalk: Ta on troi dat co nguoi den cuu ta roi, neu bang huu khong den coi nhu ta xong doi roi

Task.Title: Tuyet canh bong lai 2/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Dai Hiep, phien dai hiep ra tay giup ta danh tieu diet dan Bao nay duoc khong ?
Task.DoingTalk: Giup su gia giai quyet<color=#FF0000> Bao Trang </color>nguy hiem.

Task.Title: Tuyet canh bong lai 3/3
Task.AcceptTalk: Giup ta trao mieng<color=#FF0000> Da Bao </color>nay nhu mot loi cam on den<color=#FFCC00> Cong Binh Tu </color>!
Task.DoingTalk: Quay ve<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Cong Binh Tu</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#FFCC00> Su Gia </color>da thoat khoi nguy hiem, bang huu da giup ta mot viec lon.

Task.Title: Thuong Nhan Gap Nan 1/9
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#FF0000> Soi Vang </color>dang de doa den tinh mang cac thuong buon, bang huu hay den cuu giup bon ho..
Task.DoingTalk: Tieu diet dan<color=#FF0000> Soi Vang </color>tru hai.

Task.Title: Thuong Nhan Gap Nan 2/9
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang huu hay quay lai gap<color=#FFCC00> Co Gioi Tien Sinh </color>, ong ay co viec tim bang huu.
Task.DoingTalk: Tim gap<color=#FFCC00> Co Gioi Tien Sinh</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Dai Hiep day roi, gan day quanh vung nui co nhieu su viec la, vat nuoi va cay trong bi ton that.....!

Task.Title: Thuong Nhan Gap Nan 3/9
Task.AcceptTalk: Dai Hiep den gap chu tiem<color=#FFCC00> Tap Hoa </color>, ong ay co nguoi than o tren nui.
Task.DoingTalk: Di tim chu tiem<color=#FFCC00> Tap Hoa </color>tim hieu tinh hinh
Task.CompleteTalk: Chau trai ta bao tin ve mot loai thu du, gay nguy hiem cho cu dan tren nui<color=#FFCC00> Hoa Son </color>, Dai Hiep co the tim no de chi duong.

Task.Title: Thuong Nhan Gap Nan 4/9
Task.AcceptTalk: Con ta ten<color=#FFCC00> Dau Dau </color>dang o lu quan. Dai Hiep co the tim<color=#FFCC00> Dau Dau </color>dan duong len nui, co nguoi thong thuoc dia hinh se tranh duoc nguy hiem.
Task.DoingTalk: Tim<color=#FFCC00> Dau Dau </color>nho giup do.
Task.CompleteTalk: Dai Hiep la nguoi giup thon cua de tieu diet<color=#FF0000> Linh Mieu </color>?

Task.Title: Thuong Nhan Gap Nan 5/9
Task.AcceptTalk: Chung ta di thoi, moi nguoi dang cho chung ta!
Task.DoingTalk: Len nui<color=#FFCC00> Hoa Son </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Thon Dan</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Cuu tinh toi roi, may ngay gan day chung toi song trong lo lang, bon chung rat hung giu,<color=#FFCC00> Tieu Son </color>suyt mat mang....!

Task.Title: Thuong Nhan Gap Nan 6/9
Task.AcceptTalk: Dai Hiep hay hoi con ta, no may man tron duoc dot tan cong.
Task.DoingTalk: Tim<color=#FFCC00> Tieu Son </color>nho giup do.
Task.CompleteTalk: Con vat do than dai, da vang rat hung du, hay giup dan lang tieu diet chung!

Task.Title: Thuong Nhan Gap Nan 7/9
Task.AcceptTalk: Chung thuong o trung tam thung lung. Dai Hiep co the bat gap duoc neu di ve phia do.
Task.DoingTalk: Len nui tieu diet<color=#FFCC00> Linh Mieu</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: That la tot qua roi, dan lang tu nay se duoc yen on, cam on Dai Hiep.

Task.Title: Thuong Nhan Gap Nan 8/9
Task.AcceptTalk: Dan lang se to chuc buoi tiec an mung va chieu dai ngai.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Tieu Ngu</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Dai Hiep co quay lai nua ko?

Task.Title: Thuong Nhan Gap Nan 9/9
Task.AcceptTalk: Lon len Ngu nhi se giong Nguoi, la mot Dai Hiep giup dan tru hai, Dai Hiep hay quay lai nhe....!
Task.DoingTalk: Quay ve<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong </color>bao tin cho chu tiem<color=#FFCC00> Tap Hoa</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: That la may man vi co su giup do cua Dai Hiep, ta co chut qua mong ngai khong che.

Task.Title: Co Quan Bao Vat 1/11
Task.AcceptTalk: Dai Hiep can trang bi tot hay tim den ta, ta se ban cho Dai Hiep voi gia tot nhat....!
Task.DoingTalk: Thong bao cho<color=#FFCC00> Co Gioi Tien Sinh</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: That khong don gian, hy vong chi la mot dan<color=#FF0000> Linh Mieu </color>, song gio sap ap toi roi....

Task.Title: Co Quan Bao Vat 2/11
Task.AcceptTalk: Tri thuc la suc manh! Hay den gap<color=#FFCC00> Vo Lam Truyen Nhan </color>, ong ay co the chi diem cho Dai Hiep.
Task.DoingTalk: Noi chuyen tham hiem voi<color=#FFCC00> Vo Lam Truyen Nhan</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#FFCC00> Cai Bang </color>la thien ha de nhat bang, giu duoc long ho viec giu thien ha khong kho. bang huu hay den do giao luu mot chuyen !

Task.Title: Co Quan Bao Vat 3/11
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi<color=#FFCC00> Cai Bang </color>trong nghia, vo tu tieu dao, than thu bat pham khong dang buoc voi doi tu do tu tai . Noi do thuong xay ra hon chien, thieu hiep hay de phong.
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Cai Bang </color>tim chuong mon<color=#FFCC00> Ha Nhan Nga</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#FFCC00> Tong Truong Lao </color>da den<color=#FFCC00> Hoa Lang Dong </color>truoc, hao han hay den gap ong ay xem co the giup gi

Task.Title: Co Quan Bao Vat 4/11
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#FFCC00> Hoa Lang Dong </color>nay co rat nhieu co quan, bang huu hay can than, lo dang chut la mat mang day.
Task.DoingTalk: Quay ve<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong </color>bao tin cho<color=#FFCC00> Vo Lam Truyen Nhan</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: <color=#FFCC00> Cai Bang </color>lay su doan ket lam trong, vi vay bang chung cai bang luon thau hieu cac tran phap ao dieu!

Task.Title: Co Quan Bao Vat 5/11
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi cua<color=#FFCC00> Cai Bang </color>da di tien phong tim hieu tinh hinh, bang huu hay tim y.
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Hoa Lang Dong </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Tong Truong Lao</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: Cac de tu<color=#FFCC00> Cai Bang </color>dang bi<color=#FF0000> Soi Du </color>bua vay, mong cac ha tuong tro .

Task.Title: Co Quan Bao Vat 6/11
Task.AcceptTalk: Quy nhan den<color=#FFCC00> Cai Bang </color>choi, lai gap nhieu chuyen chang hay. That la ho then, ho then !
Task.DoingTalk: Tro giup<color=#FFCC00> Tong Truong Lao</color>, tieu diet<color=#FFCC00> Soi Xam</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Haha, cac ha danh chung rat suong tay day !

Task.Title: Co Quan Bao Vat 7/11
Task.AcceptTalk: Sau trong dong con co co quan, chung ta hay tien vao tim hieu.
Task.CompleteTalk: Thu thap duoc co quan se lap cong lon cho<color=#FFCC00> Cai Bang </color>!

Task.Title: Co Quan Bao Vat 8/11
Task.AcceptTalk: Xung quanh co quan co nhieu nguy hiem, giai quyet het moi co the thu thap co quan.
Task.DoingTalk: Tim va tieu diet<color=#FFCC00> Soi Xam</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Cac bang huu cung den vi vi bao vat nay, cung mot muc dich, hop tac cung thu thap la tot nhat.

Task.Title: Co Quan Bao Vat 9/11
Task.AcceptTalk: Hay giup ta thu thap co quan.
Task.DoingTalk: Thu thap<color=#FFCC00> Co Quan </color>giup<color=#FFCC00> Tong Truong Lao</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Da ta, co co quan nay<color=#FFCC00> Cai Bang </color>se them mot phan suc manh, on cua thieu hiep ta nho ro.....!

Task.Title: Co Quan Bao Vat 10/11
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang chu chac dang cho tin, thieu hiep hay tro ve thong bao cho ngai....
Task.DoingTalk: Tro ve<color=#FFCC00> Cai Bang </color>tim chuong mon<color=#FFCC00> Ha Nhan Nga </color>thong bao tinh hinh.
Task.CompleteTalk: Hau sinh kha uy, tuong lai cua bang huu se rat xa, ta cho ngay do.

Task.Title: Co Quan Bao Vat 11/11

Task.Title: Kiep Nan Thieu Lam Tu 1/6

Task.Title: Kiep Nan Thieu Lam Tu 2/6

Task.DoingTalk: Dieu tra dan trau trung doc, tieu diet<color=#FFCC00> Trau Rung </color>sau do quay lai tim<color=#FFCC00> Phuong Truong</color>.

Task.Title: Kiep Nan Thieu Lam Tu 4/6

Task.DoingTalk: Giup<color=#FFCC00> Phuong Truong </color>di hai<color=#FFCC00> Thao Duoc</color>

Task.Title: Kiep Nan Thieu Lam Tu 5/6

Task.Title: Kiep Nan Thieu Lam Tu 6/6

Task.CompleteTalk: Nguoi cua<color=#FFCC00> Thieu Lam </color>het loi khen ngoi bang huu, tuoi tre da co long anh dung nhu vay, that la hiem co!

Task.Title: Tam Dai Thanh Thi 1/7

Task.Title: Tam Dai Thanh Thi 4/7

Task.Title: Tam Dai Thanh Thi 5/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Cho ta co cac loai xe ngua khac nhau, bang huu co the thue 1 chiec, duong di xa xoi ta khuyen bang huu nen thue xe di chuyen. O<color=#FFCC00> Phuong Tuong </color>ta co mot nguoi ban, bang huu co the hoi tin tuc.
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Phuong Tuong </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Du Vu</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: bang huu la ban cua han sao, han co khoe khong? Ta van nho mui vi ruou cua tiem han, that la my vi nhan gian, lan sau gap han phai tra cong cho ta lan nay.

Task.Title: Tam Dai Thanh Thi 6/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Gan day co mot so nguoi tu noi khac den dang thu mua luong thuc, ngoai ra con thue tieu cuc de van chuyen.....

Task.CompleteTalk: Thong tin khach hang khong the tiet lo, da nhan tien thi phai lam viec, mong thieu hiep khong nen lam kho ta. Nhung ta co the noi noi ta den..........<color=#FFCC00> Kiem Mon Quan </color>

Task.Title: Tam Dai Thanh Thi 7/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Do la noi khong gianh cho mot nguoi tre tuoi nhu bang huu, nguy hiem den tinh mang luon rinh rap, ta khuyen bang huu nen quay ve.

Task.CompleteTalk: Ra la vay, bang huu quay lai la su lua chon sang suot, do la noi tap trung cac cao thu cua<color=#FFCC00> Kim Quoc </color>, voi vo cong hien tai neu bang huu den chi tim duong chet!

Task.Title: Bay Binh Bo Tran 1/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Bang huu hay truyen loi ta den<color=#FFCC00> Tru Tri Phap Mon Tu </color>, theo doi nguoi den tu vung ngoai o, de y hanh dong cua ho.

Task.CompleteTalk: Ta hieu roi, nhung ta can thi chu lien lac voi cac de tu ngoai mon, thong bao cho ho y kien cua ta.

Task.Title: Bay Binh Bo Tran 2/6

Task.CompleteTalk: De tu da ro, da ta thieu hiep, ta se chu y.

Task.Title: Bay Binh Bo Tran 3/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Thieu hiep nen hanh dong bi mat, tranh tai mat cua dich.
Task.DoingTalk: Truyen loi cua Tru Tri den<color=#FFCC00> Sam Hung</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: De tu nghe lenh, da ta thieu hiep.

Task.Title: Bay Binh Bo Tran 4/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Gan day co nhieu nguoi la mua thong tin tu tuu diem, gan do co nguoi cua ta.

Task.CompleteTalk: De tu se chu y, da ta thieu hiep.

Task.Title: Bay Binh Bo Tran 5/6
Task.AcceptTalk: De tu buon ban tai day, moi chuyen se chu y, co dong tinh se bao tin cho<color=#FFCC00> Tru Tri </color>

Task.Title: Pho Thac Cua Dai Nhan 1/7

Task.Title: Pho Thac Cua Dai Nhan 2/7

Task.Title: Pho Thac Cua Dai Nhan 4/7

Task.CompleteTalk: That nhanh nhen, ta co the hoan thanh som hon du kien....

Task.Title: Pho Thac Cua Dai Nhan 5/7

Task.CompleteTalk: Duoc, cho ta voi chu tiem co giao tinh, bao voi ong ay ta se sang giup.

Task.Title: Pho Thac Cua Dai Nhan 6/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Trong viec may va, khong duoc bao nhieu nguoi co the gioi hon ta.
Task.DoingTalk: Quay lai bao cao tinh hinh cho<color=#FFCC00> Chu Tiem Tap Hoa</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Tot roi toi roi, tat ca nguyen lieu da du, can chut thoi gian la co the hoan thanh, cong lao thieu hiep rat lon, ta se giam gia cho dai nhan.

Task.Title: Pho Thac Cua Dai Nhan 7/7
Task.AcceptTalk: Thieu hiep hay tro ve bao voi dai nhan, khi hoan thanh<color=#FF0000> Quan Phuc </color>ta se mang sang tan noi.
Task.DoingTalk: Bao tin cho<color=#FFCC00> Vo Lam Truyen Nhan</color>
Task.CompleteTalk: bang huu lam viec rat hieu qua, ta khong nhin lam nguoi, con nhiem vu tiep theo , bang huu da chuan bi chua?

Task.Title: Chuan Bi Duoc Hoan 1/6
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#FF0000> Quan Phuc </color>da xong, tiep theo nguoi giup ta chuan bi duoc lieu cho doanh trai, hay den gap chu hieu thuoc.
Task.DoingTalk: Di tim<color=#FFCC00> Chu Hieu Thuoc</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Dai nhan can 1 luong lon dan duoc? Thieu hiep hay giup ta thu thap duoc lieu nhe.

Task.Title: Chuan Bi Duoc Hoan 2/6
Task.AcceptTalk: O ngoai thanh<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong </color>co moc<color=#FFCC00> Linh Chi </color>, thieu hiep hay di thu thap ve cho ta.
Task.DoingTalk: Thu thap<color=#FFCC00> Linh Chi </color>o ngoai thanh<color=#FFCC00> Tuong Duong</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Tot lam, con mot so nguyen lieu nua.

Task.Title: Chuan Bi Duoc Hoan 3/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Giup ta thu thap chut<color=#FFCC00> Nhan Sam </color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Den ngoai thanh<color=#FFCC00> Bien Kinh </color>thu thap<color=#FFCC00> Nhan Sam</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Than thu thieu hiep that nhanh, tiep theo.....

Task.Title: Chuan Bi Duoc Hoan 4/6
Task.AcceptTalk: Bay gio nguoi hay di thu thap<color=#FFCC00> Duong Quy </color>giup ta.
Task.DoingTalk: Den ngoai thanh<color=#FFCC00> Phuong Tuong </color>thu thap<color=#FFCC00> Duong Quy</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Con vi thuoc cuoi cung, kha kho tim........

Task.Title: Chuan Bi Duoc Hoan 5/6
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#FFCC00> Thien Son Tuyet Lien </color>, moc tren dinh<color=#FFCC00> Hoa Son </color>, duong di kha nguy hiem, thieu hiep can than.
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Hoa Son </color>thu thap<color=#FFCC00> Thien Son Tuyet Lien</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Duoc lieu da du, thieu hiep cho to dieu che.......

Task.Title: Chuan Bi Duoc Hoan 6/6
Task.AcceptTalk: <color=#FF0000> Duoc Hoan </color>da xong, thieu hiep hay dua ve cho dai nhan
Task.DoingTalk: Dem Thuoc ve giao cho<color=#FFCC00> Vo Lam Truyen Nhan</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Thuoc tot! tat ca da du, bang huu da giup ta rat nhieu, day la phan thuong se giup ich cho bang huu.

Task.Title: Hoang Kim Trang Bi 1/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Nguoi da du ban linh de nhan trong trach quan trong hon, hay quay lai<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen </color>noi chuyen voi<color=#FFCC00> Long Ngu </color>.
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Long Ngu</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Nguoi da truong thanh rat nhieu roi

Task.Title: Hoang Kim Trang Bi 2/8
Task.AcceptTalk: Da den luc di gap lai bang huu cu roi, hay bat dau tu thu kho dai nhan.
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Trau Duc Khoai</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Nguoi da thay doi rat nhieu !

Task.Title: Hoang Kim Trang Bi 3/8
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Vo Su</color>.

Task.Title: Hoang Kim Trang Bi 4/8
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Chu Tiem Tap Hoa</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Lau qua khong gap, nguoi khoe chu?

Task.Title: Hoang Kim Trang Bi 5/8
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Xa Phu</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Bat cu khi nao can nguoi co the den tim ta!

Task.Title: Hoang Kim Trang Bi 6/8
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Ngo Than Y</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: O day ta co the cung cap bat cu loai thuoc ma nguoi can!

Task.Title: Hoang Kim Trang Bi 7/8
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Le Quan</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Ta co rat nhieu nhiem vu, nguoi co muon lam?

Task.Title: Hoang Kim Trang Bi 8/8
Task.DoingTalk: Den<color=#FFCC00> Ba Lang Huyen </color>tim<color=#FFCC00> Long Ngu</color>.
Task.CompleteTalk: Tren duong hanh tau giang ho, thinh thoang nguoi co the quay lai tim<color=#FFCC00> Le Quan </color>. Ong ta se giup do nguoi

Task.AcceptTalk: Do cua nguoi da cu, nguoi hay ren cho minh do moi ,hy vong no se giup nguoi lam viec nghiep lon.
